title: First Encounter
description: Anna Scott walks into William's bookshop and their eyes meet for the first time.
quote: Can I help you at all?

title: Orange Juice
description: A clumsy William spills orange juice on Anna and invites her back to clean up.
quote: There's always something of a surprise whenever movie stars appear.

title: The Return
description: Anna returns to the bookshop and William realises his feelings.

title: Running Through the Wall
description: Harry charges at the barrier between platforms 9 and 10 and finds the hidden platform.
quote: All you have to do is walk straight at the barrier.

title: Boarding the Hogwarts Express
description: Harry boards the scarlet steam train for the very first time, meeting Ron Weasley.

title: Diary Entry
description: Bridget stares out her window at Borough Market, narrating her resolutions.
quote: New Year's Resolution: drink less, find a nice sensible boyfriend.

title: Morning Chaos
description: Bridget rushes out of her flat in the morning into the market crowd below.

title: The Performance
description: Will presents Romeo and Juliet to a packed theatre — Viola watches from the galleries.

title: The Finale
description: The final scene of the play mirrors the real tragedy unfolding between Will and Viola.

title: The Pilot – The One Where Monica Gets a Roommate
description: Ross enters Central Perk heartbroken after his divorce; Rachel runs in in a wedding dress.
episodeTitle: The One Where Monica Gets a Roommate
quote: Welcome to the real world. It sucks. You're gonna love it.

title: Smelly Cat Recording
description: Phoebe records 'Smelly Cat' professionally while the others listen on the orange sofa.
episodeTitle: The One Where Eddie Moves In
quote: Smelly cat, smelly cat, what are they feeding you?

title: Ross Professes His Love
description: Ross finally tells Rachel how he feels over coffee at the Central Perk counter.
episodeTitle: The One Where Ross and Rachel... You Know

title: The Rooftop Meeting
description: Annie rushes to the observation deck on Valentine's Day and finally meets Sam.
quote: It was a sign. I knew it the first time I touched her hand.

title: Opening Breakfast
description: Holly steps out of a taxi on an empty Fifth Avenue and gazes at Tiffany's windows.
quote: Nothing very bad could happen to you at Tiffany's.

title: Window Shopping
description: Holly returns to gaze at the jewellery, dreaming of the life she wants.

title: I'll Have What She's Having
description: Sally's famous deli demonstration that stops the entire restaurant.

title: Cracking the Creme Brulee
description: Amelie savours her favourite pleasure — breaking the caramelised top of a creme brulee.

title: Plotting Good Deeds
description: Amelie watches the regulars and devises her next secret mission from behind the counter.

title: The Reading
description: Jesse gives a reading at Shakespeare and Company; Celine appears in the audience.
quote: I guess when you're young, you just believe there'll be many people with whom you'll connect.

title: Arrival on Naboo
description: Anakin and Padme arrive at the royal palace on Naboo, its architecture breathtaking.

title: The Forbidden Romance
description: Anakin and Padme stroll through the palace corridors, their feelings growing.

title: Courier Drop
description: A covert exchange inside the bookshop reveals the first piece of the cipher.
quote: This is not the book you think it is.

title: Midnight Exchange
description: Under the Pont Neuf lamps, the crew receives a warning and a map fragment.

title: The Sugar Code
description: A cafe clue reveals the next destination as the team deciphers a hidden note.

title: Rooftop Pursuit
description: A chase across the observatory deck ends with a narrow escape.

title: The Final Hand-Off
description: The team confronts the buyer beneath the grand arches of Plaza de Espana.
quote: It's over when we say it's over.

title: Seine Getaway
description: A final sprint across the bridge closes the chase as the sirens fade.
